---
title: "Varfor Open Source"
title-block-style: none
description: "Jamfor open source-infrastruktur med proprietara alternativ. Verkliga skillnader i kostnad, kontroll, sakerhet och EU-efterlevnad."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Varfor Open Source?</h1>
    <p>Jamfor open source-infrastruktur med proprietara alternativ. Verkliga skillnader, inte marknadsforing.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- JAMFORELSETABELL -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:900px;">
    <h2>Open Source vs. Proprietar</h2>
    <p class="sub">En praktisk jamforelse for europeiska organisationer.</p>

    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr; gap:0; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.15);">
      <!-- Rubrik -->
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1.5rem; font-weight:700; font-size:0.8rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#86868b;"></div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#81BD4A;">Open Source</div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#86868b;">Proprietary</div>

      <!-- Rader -->
      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Licenskostnad</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Gratis</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Per anvandare/manad</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Dataplats</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Du valjer (EU)</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Leverantoren bestammer</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Leverantorsinlasning</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Ingen</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Betydande</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Tillgang till kallkod</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Full</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Stangd</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">GDPR-efterlevnad</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Inbyggd</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Beror pa leverantoren</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Sakerhetsgranskningar</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Community + du</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Bara leverantoren</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Anpassning</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Obegransad</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Begransad av leverantoren</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Exitstrategi</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Din data, ditt format</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Smartsam migrering</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- VERKLIGA ALTERNATIV -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Vad ersatter vad</h2>
    <p class="sub">Produktionsklara open source-alternativ du kan driftsatta idag.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Microsoft 365</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Nextcloud + Collabora</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Filer, e-post, kalender, kontakter, dokumentredigering i realtid. Sjalvhostat, data i EU.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Azure AD</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Keycloak + FreeIPA</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">SSO, MFA, LDAP-katalog, federerad identitet. Foretagsklass, noll licensavgifter.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Slack / Teams</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Matrix / Mattermost</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Krypterad meddelandehantering, federation, kanaler, tradar. Full kontroll over data.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Zoom</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Jitsi Meet</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Webbaserad video, inga konton kravs. Skarmdelning, inspelning, breakout-rum.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Datadog / Splunk</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Prometheus + Grafana</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Matvarden, instrumentpaneler, larm. Skalbar fran 5 till 5 000 servrar.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Windows Server</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">NixOS / Debian</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Deklarativa, reproducerbara servrar. Inga licensavgifter per server.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BESPARINGAR -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Kostnadsbesparingar"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Betydande besparingar.<br>40-70% lagre kostnader.</h2>
        <p>Kommersiella SaaS-licenskostnader okar snabbt nar teamet vaxer. Open source-motsvarigheten (Nextcloud, Keycloak, Matrix, Jitsi) kostar noll i licenser — du betalar bara for hosting och forvaltning.</p>
        <p>Aven med professionella managerade tjanster fran chen.ist sparar de flesta organisationer betydande summor jamfort med kommersiella SaaS-licenser. <a href="/sv/booking/" class="m-lk" style="font-size:inherit;">Fa en personlig uppskattning</a>.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/sv/digital/" class="m-lk">Vara infrastrukturtjanster</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EU-STATISTIK -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">0</div><div class="m-nl">Avgifter per anvandare</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data stannar har</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Kod granskningsbar</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">40-70%</div><div class="m-nl">Kostnadsbesparingar</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Redo att ta kontroll<br>over din infrastruktur?</h2>
    <p>Gratis 30-minuters konsultation. Vi kartlagger din nuvarande stack och visar vad som ar mojligt.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/sv/booking/" class="m-b">Boka en konsultation</a>
      <a href="/sv/digital/" class="m-bo">Vara tjanster</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
